h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.statedInsightEvidence: Okay, `rainfall_mm` is the slot label, and `82` is the value copied from the `Chicago | 82 | March` row.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner is expected to continue applying the header/cell-value distinction with diminishing confusion until the check line is completed correctly.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: Copied from the row as the rainfall value = `____` / Column label used to find that value = `____`
scored.tutorReversalJustification: T3 introduces a fill-in-the-blank reversal of the usual presentation order (value before label) as a new task format, but there is no explicit stock-taking contrast showing the old route has stopped working, so only one of the two required parts is legible on the page.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no later tutor turn after the pivot learner turn (which is null), so no recognition-contingent uptake can be scored.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no later tutor turn after the pivot learner turn (which is null), so no recognition-contingent uptake can be scored.
